Vector index write degradation postmortem

Postmortems are valuable when they explain the technical trigger, the operational safeguards that failed, and which verification steps must pass before traffic returns to the repaired path.

The useful ones also document owner follow-up, rollback boundaries, and the instrumentation changes teams will use to catch the same pattern earlier next time.
